title: Work Back Schedule
excerpt:
hello All!! 
Is there a way to make workback schedule easier on Monday boards?  Please share experts. Thanks!

posts.author: TJ_S (TJS)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello All!!

Is there a way to make workback schedule easier on Monday boards? Please share experts. Thanks!

posts.author: khamblett (Kyle Hamblett)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TJ_S,
What are the chances you could provide more details on what type of workback schedule you’re looking to create?

It may be helpful to have a look at monday.com’s Templates as well as our Dependencies as a place to start.

Once learning more, we’re happy to point you in the right direction!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
